data.title: SHARE Secures Seed Funding Led by Greenfield Capital
data.description: Decentralized physical infrastructure network SHARE has successfully completed its seed funding round. According to Foresight News, the round was led by Greenfield Capital, with participation from Kosmos Ventures, Generative Ventures, Zee Prime Capital, and other strategic funds and angel investors. The specific amount raised in the funding round has not been disclosed.

data.title: Circle's founder has confirmed that Arc Network will issue its own cryptocurrency; more details will be revealed later.
data.description: During a speech at an offline event in Seoul, South Korea, Circle founder and CEO Jeremy Allaire stated (video 31:11): "We are exploring issuing a token for Arc Network (Circle's stablecoin payment public chain) to align governance, incentives, and economic benefits, and to gradually transition it to a PoS system. We hope to announce more details in the near future."

data.title: Daniel Moreno-Gama Faces Charges for Attempted Murder and Explosive Threats
data.description: Daniel Moreno-Gama has been charged with attempted murder following an attack on Sam Altman's residence last week. According to NS3.AI, federal prosecutors have also accused Moreno-Gama of attempting to use explosives to damage property and illegally possessing an unregistered firearm.

data.title: Trump used the ceasefire agreement to block the Strait of Hormuz, causing Iran to suffer daily economic losses of approximately $435 million.
data.description: Trump retweeted a Washington Post article stating that during a meeting with Iranian officials in Islamabad, the US ordered destroyers to the Persian Gulf to impose a military blockade on all traffic entering and leaving Iranian ports. This action aims to cut off Iran's oil exports and energy revenues. According to Miad Maleki, a former official at the US Treasury Department's Office of Foreign Assets Control, this will cause Iran approximately $435 million in economic losses daily. Currently, the US Navy is using the ceasefire period to clear Iranian-laid mines and establish safe passage for international escort missions. If Iran refuses to open the straits to all ships, the US will use military force to force passage and prohibit Iranian-flagged vessels from passing. A US Central Command report indicates that in the initial military operations, the US and Israel have destroyed 80% of Iran's air defense systems, 90% of its naval forces, and 80% of its nuclear industrial base.

data.title: Tether CEO Hints at Major Announcement on April 14
data.description: Tether CEO Paolo Ardoino has hinted at a significant announcement set for April 14. According to BlockBeats, Ardoino's message has sparked interest and speculation within the cryptocurrency community. Details of the announcement remain undisclosed, leaving many to anticipate its potential impact on the market.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Gold Jewelry Prices Rise in China
data.description: On April 14, Jin10 reported that gold jewelry prices in China have increased compared to the previous day. According to Jin10, Laopu Gold's pure gold jewelry is priced at 1,543 yuan per gram, marking an 8 yuan increase from yesterday. Meanwhile, Chow Sang Sang's pure gold jewelry (selling price) is listed at 1,455 yuan per gram, reflecting a 12 yuan rise.

data.title: China's Export Growth Slows Amid Global Energy Disruptions
data.description: China's export growth experienced a significant slowdown in March, highlighting increasing pressures on the world's second-largest economy. Bloomberg posted on X that the ongoing conflict in Iran has disrupted global energy supplies, contributing to the economic challenges faced by China. This development underscores the broader impact of geopolitical tensions on international trade and economic stability.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant: U.S. Should 'Wait and See' Before Cutting Rates
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant has emphasized the importance of adopting a 'wait and see' approach before considering any interest rate cuts. According to Jin10, Besant's remarks highlight the need for careful assessment of economic conditions prior to making monetary policy adjustments. This stance comes amid ongoing discussions about the future direction of U.S. interest rates, as policymakers weigh the potential impacts on the economy. Besant's comments reflect a cautious approach, suggesting that premature rate cuts could have unintended consequences. The U.S. Treasury continues to monitor economic indicators closely to inform its decisions.

data.title: U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant Confident Recent Price Hikes Won't Deeply Affect Inflation Expectations
data.description: U.S. Treasury Secretary Besant expressed confidence that the recent increase in prices will not significantly impact inflation expectations. According to Jin10, Besant emphasized that the current economic indicators suggest stability in inflation forecasts despite the recent price movements. She reassured that the Treasury is closely monitoring the situation to ensure that inflation remains under control and does not disrupt economic growth. Besant's comments come amid ongoing discussions about the potential effects of price changes on the broader economy.

data.title: The suspect who attacked the home of OpenAI's founder has been charged with attempted murder, and his confession warned that "humanity will be wiped out by AI."
data.description: On Monday, local time, the San Francisco District Attorney's Office stated that Daniel Moreno-Gama, the suspect in last week's attack on OpenAI founder Sam Altman, has been charged with attempted murder. A statement from the Department of Justice indicates that the suspect also faces federal charges, including attempted property damage with explosives and illegal possession of an unregistered firearm. According to the indictment filed Monday in San Francisco federal court, Daniel Moreno-Gama was arrested after the attack on Friday. San Francisco Police Department officers found a document on him detailing his intentions. In the document, Daniel Moreno-Gama expressed his intention to kill Altman and warned that humanity is "imminently extinct" due to artificial intelligence.

data.title: Citrea Hosts Second Community Meetup in Seoul
data.description: Citrea is set to hold its second offline meetup, titled 'Citrea Community Hangout,' in Seoul today, April 14. According to NS3.AI, Orkun Kilic will be in attendance at the event.

data.title: PRECIOUS METALS | Spot Silver Sees 1% Daily Increase, Now at $76.34 per Ounce
data.description: Spot silver prices have expanded their daily gains to 1.00%, currently trading at $76.34 per ounce. According to Jin10, this increase reflects ongoing market dynamics influencing precious metals.

data.title: STOCKS | Asian Equities Climb as Oil Prices Decline Amid U.S.-Iran Peace Talk Hopes
data.description:
Asian stock markets experienced an uptick as oil prices fell, driven by optimism surrounding potential peace talks between the United States and Iran. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X that investors are closely monitoring developments in the diplomatic relations between the two nations, which could have significant implications for global markets.

The anticipation of further dialogue between the U.S. and Iran has contributed to a positive sentiment in Asian equities, as investors hope for a resolution that could stabilize geopolitical tensions and impact oil supply dynamics. The decline in oil prices reflects the market's response to the possibility of easing tensions, which could lead to increased oil exports from Iran.

Market analysts suggest that the ongoing discussions could pave the way for a more stable economic environment, benefiting various sectors. However, they also caution that the situation remains fluid, and any setbacks in the negotiations could reverse the current market trends.

Overall, the prospect of improved U.S.-Iran relations is being viewed as a potential catalyst for market stability, with investors keeping a close watch on the developments in the coming days.

data.title: Associated Press: The United States and Iran may hold a new round of talks on Thursday.
data.description: According to the Associated Press, the United States and Iran may hold a new round of talks on Thursday. Trump stated, "They have contacted us," and "They want to reach an agreement."

data.title: AI Tool Enhances Excel File Creation and Editing
data.description: On April 14, a new feature called 'Table Agent' was launched by Qianwen, enabling users to directly create and edit Excel files during conversations. According to Odaily, users can request Qianwen to retrieve information and generate tables, organize multi-round dialogue content into tables, or create tables based on images and files. The system typically outputs a downloadable Excel file within 1–2 minutes, eliminating the need for additional copying and pasting, and supports modifications through natural language.

data.title: The US XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $1.463 million in a single day.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, the XRP spot ETF saw a net inflow of $1.463 million yesterday (April 13th, Eastern Time). Only the Franklin XRP ETF (XRPZ) saw a net inflow yesterday, with a single-day net inflow of $1.463 million, bringing its historical total net inflow to $326 million. As of press time, the XRP spot ETF's total net asset value is $959 million, with an XRP net asset ratio of 1.16%, and a historical cumulative net inflow of $1.221 billion.

data.title: A whale holding over $100 million in assets increased its short positions in BTC and ETH, incurring a cumulative loss of over $66.19 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale that opened a short position of 255 BTC has increased its short positions in BTC (40x leverage) and ETH (25x leverage), and is currently experiencing a floating loss of over $4 million. The whale's profits have decreased from over $25 million to a loss of over $41 million, with a cumulative loss exceeding $66.19 million. It currently holds 1031 BTC, worth $76.7 million, and 11560 ETH, worth $24.4 million.

data.title: Indonesia's $15 Billion Plan to Feed Millions Faces Scrutiny
data.description:
Indonesia's President Prabowo Subianto has unveiled an ambitious $15 billion initiative aimed at providing free meals to nearly 83 million citizens, including children and pregnant women. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the scale and potential impact of this program. While the plan has garnered attention for its potential to address food insecurity, it has also faced criticism regarding its feasibility and sustainability.

Critics argue that the program's massive scale could lead to logistical challenges and financial strain on the country's resources. Concerns have been raised about the government's ability to effectively implement and manage such a large-scale initiative without encountering significant obstacles.

Despite these concerns, supporters of the plan emphasize its potential to significantly improve the nutritional status of millions of Indonesians, particularly vulnerable groups such as children and pregnant mothers. The program is seen as a bold step towards addressing long-standing issues of hunger and malnutrition in the country.

As the plan moves forward, it remains to be seen whether it will achieve its ambitious goals or face setbacks due to the challenges highlighted by its critics. The success of this initiative could have far-reaching implications for Indonesia's social and economic landscape.

data.title: The Qianwen online form agent allows users to generate and edit Excel files simply by engaging in dialogue.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported on April 14th that Qianwen launched "Table Agent," supporting the direct generation and editing of Excel files within conversations. Users can request Qianwen to retrieve information and generate tables, organize multi-turn conversations into tables, or generate tables based on images or documents. The system typically outputs downloadable Excel files within 1-2 minutes, eliminating the need for secondary copying and pasting, and supports editing via natural language. (Jinshi)

data.title: Meta's net advertising revenue is projected to reach $243.4 billion, surpassing Google this year to become the world's largest digital advertising platform.
data.description: According to the WSJ, Meta is expected to surpass Google this year to become the world's largest digital advertising platform, with net advertising revenue projected to reach $243.46 billion, compared to Google's $239.54 billion.
